entry.title: Re: SAP GUI MFA with Microsoft Entra (Part II): Integration with Microsoft Entra Private Access
entry.content:
Thank you！

I want to know whether the user's local PC needs to be added to a domain when SAP GUI SSO is implemented in this way.

entry.title: Credit Note Adjustment through API in Public cloud
entry.content:
Sabari has various credit note adjustment scenarios being received against customer invoices. This data is being received from their internal DMS application via CP and being posted into SAP through standard APIs. There are many scenarios on how the data can be received:

  • One credit note adjusting against one customer invoice
  • One credit note adjusting against multiple invoices of the same customer
  • One invoice adjusting against multiple credit notes of the same customer

When the data is received, it is split into separate sets, and each set is individually processed and posted to SAP. We found that the same credit note or invoice may be duplicated in different scenarios. Hence, the Customer Account has to be cleared in SAP after each scenario is processed, to ensure the exact balances are reflected.

Sabari is receiving data from multiple DMS systems (different Supplier Dealer Management Systems), and to process the Credit Note Adjustment data for 1 supplier and 1 day, they have to clear the customer accounts at least 4 times for each Business units ( 6 Business units x 4 times = 24 times manual clearing on  a daily basis) . This is too much manual process at the moment, and we are looking at the best options to automate this. 

APIs

Thanks,

Vignesh

entry.title: Re: (Datasphere/SAC) Time Dimension attributes not visibl...
entry.content:
Hi again,

Yeah, deleting the chart didn't help much either. However, been digging around and it seems there's currently some issues with the actual native time table in DSP and the way SAC interprets the date data.

See this SAP Note (3324920) 

Even though I tried to wire my model like the note mentioned, using the "Data, string" field instead of the Data_SQL, it still didn't work.

I was able to solve my specific issue though, by making a hierarki with only the month dimension, applying it to my chart. That enabled me to view my current year/last year data in the same chart, on the month timeline.

entry.title: Re: How to get error message from odata while using smart table and smart filter .
entry.content:
Hello there,

at the  moment I have the same problem: I raise an exception in my backend OData service and I can see the error thrown with the browsers development tools when I work with the app...but how can I display this message in a MessageBox?

I already tried with an ErrorHandler.js example, but it didn't work...where do I need to call the "attachRequestFailed" Method? Which event of the smart table do I need to use for that?

Thank you,

Christopher

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now
entry.content: Thanks Shane for sharing reference blog post.

entry.title: Automation for cheque bounce process in SAP public cloud
entry.content:
Sabari is in the wholesale and distribution industry and has collection data across various branches across the states of Kerala and Tamil Nadu. The collection data is posted daily via API calls. Some of the payments are received via Cheques and they are posted similarly to the other payment receipts. The Customer account will be cleared after the payment is received.

After the checks are presented to the Bank, in a few cases, the checks may bounce. This data has to be reversed in the customer Accounts receivable that has already been posted and cleared in SAP. We have to reset and reverse the cleared items for a case with a bounced check. We have an API available to reverse the posted documents, but there is no option to reset the cleared items with this API. Currently, Sabari is managing this manually and they have a volume of 75-100 cheques per day across all the branches, which may be bounced.

APIs API Management SAP Intelligent Robotic Process Automation 

Thanks,

Vignesh

entry.title: Re: How to Identify Documents Posted via MIR7, FV60, FV50, FV65, F-65 Without Attachments
entry.content: It is not sure as to why some documents are missing in SRGBTBREL table.  Check SAP note 2746890

entry.title: Re: SAP C4C SDK 2505: New Visual Studio 2022 based Setup
entry.content:
Hi Saurabh,

I think you are trying to create a new project from the VS2022 startup page. Don't do that. Please click on the 'Continue without code' link/button at the bottom to open the Visual Studio IDE. Then, under 'View' menu click on 'My Solutions' to open the tool window. In the 'My Solutions' window, click on 'Log On' button to login to your system.

 

Best Regards,
Sasi.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori tools May 2024 release adds closer integration with ABAP Development Tools
entry.content:
Just wanted to confirm if this is only available for:

  • SAP BTP ABAP Environment
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

But NOT available for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition/RISE?

entry.title: Rise With SAP
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently you are all aware about new SAP Business Transformation Buzz word going on by changing SAP on Premise Version to Rise With SAP (Public Cloud / Private Cloud Edition). It is gradually going towards making it mandatory for SAP Customers to move on to this new version on following ground:

ECC to S4 Hana Contract Conversion: Customer who had earlier converted contract from ECC to S4 Hana which is normal that we pay some fees for conversion. Normally we do not read the contract line items as we are under the impression that we have got right to use new version of SAP. This has turned into disaster as now it is not consider as license conversion. It is termed as you have ECC License for Hana use and not S4 Hana. This is totally absurd and whom to blame is a real question. This is true for many of the customers.

New On-Premise Licenses: All of us are aware that we do negotiation when we finalize the license deal. In current times there is no interest in selling on premise licenses. Even if we want to procure the prices are 10 time what we would have procured earlier. This really hurts the IT Budget & Company budgets in terms of ERP spend.

Now come the major part that as we do not have option available, we need migrate our contract from On Premise to Rise with SAP.  In this we will are surrendering our perpetual license right which we had procured and will have to pay new fees on subscription model.

The new license definition in Rise with SAP is on the basis of FUE which are determined on the basis of authorization object / activity. The same is classified as HB Professional (Ratio 1 User = 1 FUE)  / Functional (1 Fue = 5 User) / Productivity (1 FUE = 30 User). This is getting automatically determined via SAP Note 3113382.

The point which I want to highlight is that the definition which is decided on the basis of authorization object / activity is getting changed very frequently which is disturbing entire calculation of FUE count. In our case we had done the FUE Calculation basis this note with version 89 which was having list of authorization object / activity specified for classifying the user under 3 different lic. category. This definition has gone for change on 5th of June'2025 where certain object / activity which were earlier classified under category of Functional user has now got changed to Professional. So, from ratio of 5 it is has come down to 1. 

The definition change is in hand of SAP. If you just, try to evaluate the customer who had finalized the FUE and have already moved to Rise. Suddenly they will find increased number of FUE count as per the new definition so without increasing in number of users they have to pay additional cost to SAP.

This is very disturbing fact as it is clearly violation of trust which we had been carrying with SAP for so many years.  There is also known risk that as we will be moving to cloud (Public or Private) the renewals rates will be scary. We will not have any chance of negotiation which means what ever the rates which SAP wants to charge can be charge without any question ask as your entire data / landscape is in their hands unless you take a difficult decision in terms of moving to other software platform.

Aforesaid pointers need to be seriously looked into. 

Will appreciate if you can provide some insight on this.

Regards

Ketan

entry.title: Re: Quickly Generate and Deploy SAP Fiori Apps from ABAP Development Tools for Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi @LauraEiraElias 

Just wanted to confirm that this is not available for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition?

entry.title: Adding email IDs to EWA report
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We have to add the mail ids to the PERSON_NAME report. We tried the process but it was not successful.

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Adding email IDs to EWA report
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

Please refer to the following KBAs for the steps. 

2282944 - EarlyWatch Alert: Solution Manager 7.2 how to setup/configure EWA reports or add email recipients 
2531994 - T/S Guide: EarlyWatch Alerts (EWA) reports in Solution Manager 7.2 not being sent by email 

For Setup An Email Recipient for the First Time, it needs to maintain emails to the dialog user from SU01, then add the dialog user to Global Recipient List. Once the user has been added to the Global Recipient List, you will then be able to add this user to the "Maintain Recipient Lists" button in SOLMAN_SETUP -> Application Operations -> EarlyWatch Alert Management -> Maintain Recipients. 

As we tested, it supports to add multiple emails to one dialog user. However, due to the configuration page limitation, only one email is shown in the configuration UI. 

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to Update Simulation End Macro
entry.content:
Hi Shane,

Thanks for helping me. Does this need any specific role like Master author or Admin to update the text?

entry.title: How to hide post button of "Create Supplier Invoice"
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

We would like to implement the following division of roles when using the "Create Supplier Invoice" app:

・Staff in charge: Park invoices.

・Approver: Review the parked invoice created by the staff and then post it.

Question (1)

Therefore, we would like to hide the post button from the "Create Supplier Invoice" app for specific users.
We found that we can hide the post button by removing the following business catalogs from the user's role:

  • SAP_MM_BC_INV_PROCESS_MC 
  • SAP_MM_BC_INV_PROCESS_PC 
  • SAP_MM_BC_INV_SCHEDULE_PC 
  • SAP_LO_BC_LFE_CRT_INTF_PC 
  • SAP_FIN_BC_AA_DOC_PROC_PC 
  • SAP_FIN_BC_AA_POST_REG_PC 

Is this method appropriate?

We found a related comment on SAP Community and checked the KBA, but the KBA has been deleted.

Solved: how to restrict users to post suppliers invoices - SAP Community

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2834732

Question (2)

We believe that the restriction type "Authorization Groups for Journal Entry Document Type" in the business catalog is related to the visibility of post button.

If 'Write' is marked as X, post button is displayed.

The relevant application is specified in the "Applications" tab of the catalog.

Applications tab

FIN (Finance) SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP runtimes, my personal considerations and preferences on Cloud Foundry, Kyma, ABAP runtim
entry.content:
Hey @mauriciolauffer , nice comparison of the various runtimes, gives you a good way to assess the various trade-offs and make an informed decision.

I did feel that ABAP Cloud came off not so well, although with fair points against it. Scraping for extra points to help the ABAP column a fraction, would you consider that at least ABAP may be easier to deploy even complex applications (even though the trade off is the lack of flexibility as described)?

Thanks for blogging!

entry.title: Re: 2LIS_02_ITM did not get the deleted item of PO in ME2...
entry.content:
Hi Charlie

The field LOEKZ "Deletion Ind." in the extractor is what you are looking for. Filter on loekz = '' to get only active rows. 

Regards

Kristian

entry.title: Story Reporting - KPI: Number of Interviews per Quarter
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are currently preparing some recruiting KPIs, which will include the number of interviews per quarter.
We we want to use Story Reporting for this purpose.

However, we’ve encountered an issue: interviews are being counted multiple times due to the presence of multiple interviewers per interview.

Has anyone faced a similar issue, and is there a recommended way to ensure each interview is counted only once?

Thanks!

BR,

Sandra

entry.title: Re: Country Compliance Forms "Notice of Pay Rate" California WTPA form Field Configuration
entry.content:
Hi @SunithaR @smitajalit @Gopinath @ThomasBilbaugh 

The CA WTPA Form is only applicable to non-exempt employees. How can we add a filter for this? I don't see WTPA forms available in the "Trigger Compliance Forms" rule scenario. 

Could you help us understand how to setup a filter for CA WTPA To only trigger for FLSA status EQUALS Non-Exempt.

When we checked in Manage Data >> FormGlobalFilter for CA WTPA 'WORKCOUNTRY_USA_WORKSTATE_CA', the filter is set only on workcountry and workstate as shown below

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?><GlobalFilter id="WORKCOUNTRY_USA_WORKSTATE_CA"><Filter><Condition Key="workcountry" Rule="Equal" Value="USA"/><Condition Key="workstate" Rule="Equal" Value="CA"/></Filter></GlobalFilter>

How can we customize this filter to include FLSA status to limit the CA WTPA compliance task for Non-Exempt employees?

Please suggest.

Thanks,

D Harish Reddy

entry.title: Re: How to hide post button of "Create Supplier Invoice"
entry.content:
Hi ,

According the note https://me.sap.com/notes/2834732, it should fullfil your requirement.

Br,Bob

entry.title: Inquiry on Supported Network Architecture (Dual NIC / Network Separation)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

 

We are planning to implement a network separation for security compliance. However, due to internal constraints, we are not migrating the AP (Application) server to a new system.

 

Instead, we plan to add a second NIC (Network Interface Card) to the current physical server, which currently hosts both the SAP Application (AP) and Database (DB) components. This configuration aims to physically separate internal and external network communication by assigning different IPs/subnets to each NIC.

 

Details:
- SAP Application and Database run on the same physical server.
- No re-installation or new SAP instance will be created.
- Only OS-level network configuration will be changed (NIC addition, IP/subnet segmentation).
- SAP landscape remains functionally unchanged.

 

We would like to confirm the following:
1. Is this type of architecture (dual NIC, same physical server for AP and DB) officially supported by SAP?
2. Are there any known restrictions or considerations SAP recommends in such configurations?
3. Does SAP provide a recommended approach or best practice for implementing network separation (especially AP network isolation)?

 

Our System Environment:
- OS: RHEL 8
- SAP Product: SAP NetWeaver 7.4
- Database: Oracle
- Deployment Type: On-premise

 

We appreciate your guidance and confirmation on whether this architecture complies with SAP’s supported and recommended network designs.

 

Thank you in advance for your support.

 

Best regards,  


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Inquiry on Supported Network Architecture (Dual NIC /...
entry.content:
Implementing network separation by adding a second NIC to the current physical server hosting both the SAP Application and Database components is a common approach to enhance security. However, it is crucial to ensure that this configuration aligns with SAP's supported and recommended practices. Here are the answers to your questions based on SAP's general guidelines:

  1. Official Support by SAP:

    • SAP generally supports configurations where multiple NICs are used on the same physical server, provided that the operating system and network settings are correctly configured. However, it is essential to verify this with your SAP account representative to ensure that there are no specific restrictions or requirements for your particular SAP version and deployment.

  2. Known Restrictions or Considerations:

    • Network Configuration: Ensure that the network configuration is correctly set up to avoid any routing issues or conflicts between the internal and external networks.
    • Performance: Monitor the performance to ensure that the addition of a second NIC does not introduce any latency or bottlenecks.
    • Security: Properly configure firewall rules and access controls to ensure that the separation effectively enhances security.
    • SAP Kernel and Network Settings: Verify that the SAP kernel and network settings are compatible with dual NIC configurations. This may involve checking SAP notes or documentation specific to your SAP NetWeaver version.

  3. Recommended Approach or Best Practice:


    • Segmentation: Ensure that the IP/subnet segmentation is correctly implemented to achieve the desired network isolation.
    • Testing: Thoroughly test the configuration in a non-production environment to identify and resolve any issues before deploying it in production.
    • Monitoring: Implement monitoring tools to continuously monitor network traffic and performance to ensure that the separation is functioning as intended.

By following these steps, you can ensure that your network separation strategy aligns with SAP's supported and recommended practices, thereby maintaining compliance and enhancing security.

entry.title: Regarding the scope of foreign currency valuation for overseas currencies
entry.content:
Hi Dear Experts,

I would like to confirm whether items for which the order rate is set can be excluded from the scope of foreign currency valuation.

The background is that I am currently investigating the constraints regarding foreign exchange contracts on the public cloud.

We are considering an operational procedure where users manually set the foreign exchange contract rate in the capture field during Order Entry- transaction code VA01.

Consequently, for foreign currency valuation, we aim to exclude items that have a foreign exchange contract rate entered (i.e., not subject to valuation), while items booked at the market rate (M rate) should be included as processing targets (i.e., subject to valuation). I am exploring whether it is possible to control the scope of foreign currency valuation based on conditions in this manner.

Please suggest.

Thank you very much.Best Regards!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.content:
Hello, great article!

I'd like to ask if it's possible to use Microsoft Entra ID in the cloud along with the Secure Login Client to implement SSO for SAP GUI? Without using cloud products, BTP, IAS, and without a local AD domain controller, and without joining user PCs locally to the domain.

entry.title: FI-CA Custom Logic
entry.content:
When reviewing the available custom logic in Eclipse, I noticed that there aren’t many BAdIs directly related to FI. However, there are quite a few BAdIs listed under the FI-CA (Contract Accounts Receivable and Payable) area.

Is it possible to directly use FI-CA BAdIs for standard FI processes?

entry.title: Re: System copy using SWPM Refresh or Move Database Insta...
entry.content:
SI2adm@XXX-SI2DB-01:/> sapcontrol -nr 00 -function GetProcessList

18.06.2025 07:55:35
GetProcessList
OK
name, description, dispstatus, textstatus, starttime, elapsedtime, pid
hdbdaemon, HDB Daemon, GREEN, Running, 2025 06 18 07:53:41, 0:01:54, 139741
hdbcompileserver, HDB Compileserver, GREEN, Running, 2025 06 18 07:53:48, 0:01:47, 140022
hdbnameserver, HDB Nameserver, GREEN, Running, 2025 06 18 07:53:41, 0:01:54, 139766
hdbpreprocessor, HDB Preprocessor, GREEN, Running, 2025 06 18 07:53:48, 0:01:47, 140025
hdbwebdispatcher, HDB Web Dispatcher, GREEN, Running, 2025 06 18 07:53:48, 0:01:47, 140066

----

As the initial refresh is triggered it, stopped the index server and as a result index server is down. so we tried to connect to system db sql and started the index service manually which fixed the issue.

hdbsql -U SYSDBKEY

select * from m_databases


SI2adm@XXX-SI2DB-01:/usr/sap/SI2/HDB00/XXX-SI2db-01/trace> hdbsql -U SYSDBKEY

Welcome to the SAP HANA Database interactive terminal.

Type: \h for help with commands
\q to quit

hdbsql SYSTEMDB=> alter system start databse SI2
* 257: sql syntax error: incorrect syntax near "databse": line 1 col 20 (at pos 20) SQLSTATE: HY000
hdbsql SYSTEMDB=> alter system start database SI2
0 rows affected (overall time 38.106033 sec; server time 38.105632 sec)

entry.title: Re: How to synchronize Set Controlling Hierarchies in SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: Without reading everything, did you check if this is something which comes from timedependancies? We had issues which we resolved by this. also be sure to set reporting relevance without this you can't do this. I personally avoid this programm, we currently use another report from SAP (FINS_UH_SET_HIER_UPDATE) which we customized because SAP is not able to resolve their own made problems like GL Groups with suffixes for different time slices (which was recommended from SAP years ago).

entry.title: Re: FI-CA Custom Logic
entry.content:
Hello i would say No — FI-CA BAdIs cannot be directly used for standard FI processes.

Why not?

Because FI-CA is not the same as classic FI (Financial Accounting).

Aspect FI (Classic) FI-CA (Contract Accounts Receivable & Payable)

Use caseGeneral Ledger, Accounts Payable (AP), Accounts Receivable (AR), Asset Accounting (AA)Industry-specific (e.g., utilities, telecom), subscription billing, mass processing
Technical modulesFI-GL, FI-AP, FI-AR, FI-AAFI-CA (FICA module, uses own tables like DFKKOP)
ArchitectureUses BSEG, BKPF, etc.Uses its own document management and open item logic
BAdIs and EnhancementsSpecific to classic processesHighly specialized for FICA contract accounting

So, if your business scenario is running standard SAP Financials (without using industry solutions like IS-U, IS-T, etc.), then FI-CA BAdIs are irrelevant to your custom logic. They are:

  • Technically isolated (different data model, document structure)
  • Business-process specific (meant for mass billing, utility invoicing, telecom usage, etc.)

What should you use instead?

For standard FI processes, especially in S/4HANA, focus on:

🔹Relevant Enhancement Techniques:

  • BAdIs under packages like FAGL*, FIEB*, FB*, ACC*
  • User-exits (like EXIT_SAPMF05A_001)
  • Substitution/Validation via transaction OB28 (GL), GGB1, etc.
  • Custom logic with BADI_FINS_CUSTOMER (in S/4HANA)

🔹In S/4HANA:

Use In-App Extensibility via:

  • Custom Business Logic (ABAP in Eclipse or SAP BAS)
  • Business Contexts like Finance: Journal Entry Item (FINS_JOURNAL_ENTRY_ITEM)
  • Check /nSCDTMRM or /nSCFD_REGISTRY for available in-app BAdIs relevant to FI Journal Entries

Tip:

To explore only relevant BAdIs for standard FI, filter in Eclipse or SE18 by:

  • Component: FI, FI-GL, FI-AR, FI-AP
  • Business Context: FINS*, AC_DOCUMENT*

🧾 Summary

Question Answer

Can FI-CA BAdIs be used for standard FI? No — not compatible or relevant
Are FI and FI-CA technically interchangeable?No — different data models, tables, processes
Where to find BAdIs for FI processes?Use FINS*, AC*, FI-* namespaces or in-app contexts

Best regards

entry.title: Training Customizing-Create a Custom Business Role with a Custom Launchpad Space and Page
entry.content:
I can not made this.  Excersize. I went to Lauch spaces- then predifend and copy role and change things acording

I got autorization failure message:

itle: ErrorMessage: User CB9980000376: Missing AuthorizationDetails:    "error":       "code": "/UI2/FDM/005",      "message":          "lang": "en",         "value": "User CB9980000376: Missing Authorization"      ,      "innererror":          "application":             "component_id": "CA-FLP-ABA",            "service_namespace": "/UI2/",            "service_id": "FDM_SPACE_REPOSITORY_CUST_SRV",            "service_version": "0001"         ,         "transactionid": "403083819C0D4D9C82F30ADA52E36F16",         "timestamp": "20250618062746.2397890",         "Error_Resolution":             "SAP_Transaction": "For backend administrators: use ADT feed reader \"SAP Gateway Error Log\" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details",            "SAP_Note": "See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)",            "Batch_SAP_Note": "See SAP Note 1869434 for details about working with $batch (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1869434)"         ,         "errordetails": [                           "ContentID": "",               "code": "/UI2/CX_FDM_AUTHORIZATION",               "message": "User CB9980000376: Missing Authorization",               "propertyref": "",               "severity": "error",               "transition": false,               "target": ""            ,                           "ContentID": "",               "code": "/UI2/CX_FDM_PAGE_SERVICE_BUSI",               "message": "User CB9980000376: Missing Authorization",               "propertyref": "",               "severity": "error",               "transition": false,               "target": ""            

------

Task 1: Create a Custom Business Role from a Template and Assign to your Business User
In this exercise, you will create a custom business role from an SAP-delivered template and assign the role to your business user.1.
Create a custom business role from a template with the following information:●
Template: Business Process Specialist (SAP_BR_BUSINESS_PROCESS_SPEC)●
New Business Role ID: BR_BUSINESS_PROCESS_SPEC_### (where ### is your user number)●
New Business Role Description: Business Process Specialist ###●
Option for Spaces: Create and Assign Spaces based on Predefined Spaces●
New Space ID: ZBR_BUSINESS_PROCESS_SPEC_### (delete any further rows, if necessary)2.
Change the Access Categories to Unrestricted.3.
Assign the custom role Business Process Specialist ### to your business user

entry.title: Multiple SFC execution in Workcenter POD
entry.content:
Hi Team,

There is requirement from client, asking for execution of multiple SFC's having different order numbers but the way of execution and process parameters are same. So i have designed a POD, where the worklist and operation activity list are showing in same screen with some action buttons.

But while selecting the multiple SFC's it says "The selected SFCs don’t use the same routing. Select SFCs that use the same routing."

How it can be achieved? User don't wants to go into each SFC and do start and complete, he just want everything in one screen by selecting multiple SFC's.

Attaching screenshot of designed POD for reference.

 

Regards,

Rahaman

entry.title: Warehouse tasks automation in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
How to create warehouse put away and picking (Inbound and Outbound) tasks automatically in S4 PERSON_NAME Public cloud edition,


kindly provide the configuration details or scope ids.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Warehouse tasks automation in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Inbound:

With Inbound Delivery -> It is not possible to create putaway Task automatically with inbound delivery at current release CE2502.

Without Inbound Delivery -> It is possible to generate putaway task after sync GR.  Please refer below SAP Help portal page: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/87f9b54f9c4f4e75aff0061860a6589a/2a86a0ad60854d6d9c7826978ae1264c.html?locale=en-US

 

You must configure data to enable automatic putaway warehouse task creation. In your configuration environment, use the search function to open the following activities and perform these actions:

  • Define storage types in Maintain Storage Types.
  • Define the warehouse process type in Define Warehouse Process Type.
  • Determine the warehouse process type in Determine Warehouse Process Type.

 

Outbound:

It is possible to created picking task automatically(Regularlly) or massively.

Use Wave management, please refer below SAP Help Portal Page.  https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/87f9b54f9c4f4e75aff0061860a6589a/9488e1f0f51f47228f65056bd5a662b7.html?locale=en-US

APP Schedule Warehouse Task Creation - Picking - https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/index.html#/detail/Apps('F4505')/S34

 

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: Ui5 Application unable to deploy using visual studio code
entry.content: My case was the latter and it worked after adding and activating service /UI5/ABAP_REPOSITORY_SRV in /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements + RAP: How to preserve order of batch...
entry.content:
As simple as that...

Thank you alot, excactly what I was searching for.

entry.title: S4H SD Billing Rounding Issue
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

The client wants that the condition value for PR00 condition type should not be rounded i.e. if the condition value is 100.879 the condition value should appear as 100.87 and not 100.88. I had made the condition value editable and had manually changed it to 100.87 but the Net Value at the header is rounding up the value to 100.88 after summing all deliveries against which a single invoice is created.

In this case, please can someone suggest any input since the matter is pending for long.

We are on S4H 1909.

 

Regards.

Saurav Mallick

entry.title: Re: Read Audits in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi Paul
Is there a way to track all changes done in the system - without having to guess what each person changed ? I'm currently having to ask each person as to what they did on the system - then try find audit logs. the challenge is that sometime you have more options to choose from (which makes it not easy to track)?

entry.title: Re: Position Workflow Comment is Auto Filled

entry.title: Re: Start scheduling for the SO maintenance plan.
entry.content:
Hello Joerg

I'm not sure about what you are asking ? You want to schedule that maintenance plan. Just one, right? If IP10 cannot be used, then you can run report  CRMS4_MPLAN_SINGLE_SCHEDULE

best regards

Silvia

entry.title: Re: Position Workflow Comment is Auto Filled
entry.content: Hi Sandra, Thanks a lot, it answered my query. Is there any way to auto fill comment for other workflow as well.

entry.title: Re: Delta sync is not working for custom entity created in SSAM 2405 mobile OData.
entry.content: Hello, do you have configured the OMDO as Delta-Enabled? The easiest way (in my point of view) is to create a custom Exchange-Object to create the Delta-Entries. Otherwise you have to implement the method for the Delta-Keys in your OMDO-Class.

entry.title: Re: Unable to create "Switch-Based Feature Toggles"
entry.content:
I wrote my question to SAP Support and they replied that creation of Feature Toggles (object type FTG2) is not supported for SAP customers. SAP customers can only view Feature Toggles and toggle some Feature Toggles. Feature Toggles can be created only by SAP.

When trying to edit (not toggling) Feature Toggle below error appears:

And answering to my second question - Feature Toggles is different from Switch Framework (SFW* transactions).

entry.title: Re: Multiple SFC execution in Workcenter POD
entry.content:
Hi,
from standard point of view i don't think what you are asking it is possible.
Because order1 could have op1 op2 op3, order2 could have op3 op4 op5 and that's why there is this kind of misunderstanding from Operation Activity plugin (they could not merge all operations for multiple orders, could be a mess from std point of view!).

Do you need to see all the operations? Or could you create a custom buttom that for given input orders and given input workcenter could start&complete all the operations that belong to that workcenter for the given order and then process next orders, right?

To do that the way that i would you suggest is to create a "workcenter pod" from POD Designer and then you should use the same worklist plugin that you are currently using but you have to create a custom plugin for create custom button. By clicking on that custom button you can get the reference on the worklist and get all the selected orders. With the selected orders you can call a production process (made inside SAP DM) that are getting operations list for that workcenter and looping to do start/complete for each operations.

If you don't have experience on developing custom plugin from SAP BTP side (it's not so complex) and you can follow this reference: https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blog-posts-by-sap/standard-pod-plugin-extensions-in-sap-digital-manufacturing/ba-p/13731078
just import the git repository and then you have to create a dm-pod-plugin in order to create custom button that are calling production process as API.

If you don't know how to call a production process as API let me know.

entry.title: Re: a unit of measure (UoM) mismatch in SAP Byd , which c...
entry.content: Dear Customer, This could be inconsistency which needs backend correction. Please report a case to SAP regarding this issue. Henry SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Auto Person ID generation for Hire/Rehire
entry.content:
Hi,

Please avoid configuring rule as an onsave rule and follow the below KBA for detailed steps

2678155 - Rule-based Generation of UserID/Username for Hires & Rehires with New Employment - SAP for Me

After the rule is configured, go to Manage Data > Select Hire/Rehire Configuration > MatchUserConfiguration, and add the rule created there

Best regards,

Elsa

Hi All,
We are having this issue where a support consultant gets this error when he logs in:


I log in with the same user, Support, but I dont have that issue on my side.  The only difference is that he is working on a terminal server, whereas I have the client installed on my pc. 
I restarted the RSP service, ran and uploaded the SSR again, but the issue still persists on his side.
Has anyone had this issue before? Please assist.

Regards,
Jerusha

entry.title: Re: 2LIS_02_ITM did not get the deleted item of PO in ME2...
Re: Quickly Generate and Deploy SAP Fiori Apps from ABAP Development Tools for Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi @jeremiah_duroya,

the feature is planned to be available with the next SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2025 release.

entry.title: Re: Users can confirm a Production Task even after changi...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

The Backflush confirmation method of input product could help propose confirmed quantity of input product according to BoM when confirmed quantity in reporting point is maintained. Each time you change the reporting point quantity in the production task, the system recalculates the dependent quantities. However, once you manually changed the dependent, the system does not recalculate them anymore. That is, once you manually changed the values proposed by the system, the original backflush line behaves like an explicit line.

Once you saved the confirmation task, all fields are initialized and the line is set back to the original backflush behavior.

This is a business flexibility that ByD provides to end users since sometimes the actual input quantity is different with expected quantity. More details please read help document "Production Confirmations" : https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_BYDESIGN/2754875d2d2a403f95e58a41a9c7d6de/2cc90003722d101497c297399f08c4f5.html

Henry

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP Business Data Cloud - S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
entry.content:
@ShailendarAnugu 

Thank you so much for this.

Regards

Afshin

entry.title: Re: Last login timestamp per RP
entry.content:
Hi @flukic 

If you go to each RP site in the CDC Console and find the user profile in question, you will see the last login timestamp. This is the time the user logged in through this specific RP site. To find the same login timestamp from your application, you can use the accounts.search API. 

Here is an example account search API response payload from the Identity Query Tool, showing the loginProvider/socialProvider, lastLoginTimestamp, regSource (the RP app) and lastLoginLocation, etc. 

At the same time, you can go to the OP site in the CDC Console and search for the same user profile, you will see the similar fields like lastLoginTimestamp and regSource(the OP app), but this time through the OP site point of view. The loginProvider and socialProvider for the OP site will be just regular CDC site. 

Hope that helps 🙂

Gargi

entry.title: Re: Start scheduling for the SO maintenance plan.
entry.content: SAP JOB for maintenance plan call-off with service order There is a separate report for the SO maintenance plan. 'RISTRA20' and ‘RISTRA20H’ cannot process the SO maintenance plans. The report for Service Order is: 'CRMS4_MPLAN_MASS_SCHEDULE' TA SE38 and Sm37 JOB with CRMS4_MPLAN_MASS_SCHEDULE Or CRMS4_MPLAN_SINGLE_SCHEDULE

entry.title: Re: How to release a delivery block in S/4HANA Service Ad...
entry.content:
Hi Silvia,

thanks a lot for your quick answer! We have considered that but the risk is very high that key users maintain new spare parts in sales order instead of service order. Therefore, these spare parts are not replicated to service order. In the case of Advanced Shipment via SRVV it wouldn't be possible to create a follow-up service confirmation for those spare parts. 

It seems like the Standard Integration of Advanced Shipment is not sufficient at the moment regarding Delivery Blocks or Desired Delivery Date manipulation.

We will have a look at it though. We were just wondering what is the best practices to keep both documents in sync. 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Validation to Restrict MIGO Posting to Blocked Storag...
entry.content: Thnxxx

entry.title: Re: Create local users in SAP Cloud Connector without usi...
entry.content:
There is no own user management offered by Cloud Connector.
Various users are supposed to work via an LDAP directory service only.

So, you won't get an official answer from SAP for this question, other than this is not supported by Cloud Connector.
Please also pay attention to the caution box in the documentation:
https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/installation 

Custom modifications of Tomcat configuration files are at your own risk and you might lose the eligibility for getting SAP support for such a modified installation.

entry.title: Re: New Process for Changing Display Names in SAP Community
entry.content:
Hi @jerryjanda 

Thanks for the explanation.
It's good that there's now only one place to change your username.
There are also people who prefer to remain anonymous, although I can't understand that in a professional context. You want to be associated with your good content.
What I really don't understand is that even SAP employees don't have their names listed. I can understand that it's difficult to enforce, but I would like to know who wrote the post.

What is profile.sap.com for? Here I can change the display settings. It would be great if this were also visible like this in the community. So you can have your username but also your full name. Also, i can follow other people here 🙂

entry.title: Re: Start scheduling for the SO maintenance plan.

entry.title: Issue with Direct Printing of SES in ML83 – Spool Request Generated Instead of Direct Print
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

I am facing an issue with direct printing of Service Entry Sheets (SES) via Transaction ML83.

In some systems (System 1 and System 2), the SES prints directly when executed via ML83. However, in my system, the same transaction only generates a spool request instead of sending the output directly to the printer.

As a result, I need to:

  1. Manually open SP01

  2. Generate the PDF

  3. Then print it separately

This is causing extra steps and delays. I would like to enable direct print functionality through ML83 in my system, just like it works in the other systems.

Enable direct print of SES in ML83 without needing to manually process the spool request through SP01.

Your assistance in resolving this configuration inconsistency is appreciated.

Best regards,
Mohit Mishra

entry.title: Re: MIRO cancel an invoice document.
entry.content:
Dear  Expert!

        I'm Finance and Accounting Dept, I have a problem about MIR6. I cannot Delete this Doc.

Step1 : PU Dept. Start record document RM BOM in T-Code MIRO = 5100357435    

Step2 : FIN Dept. when get a document from PU Record in MIR6 = 5100000796

**But record it's wrong i forgot Something, I can't revise this document.**

Step3 : FIN Dept. Reversed in MR8M = 5100000797

Step4 : FIN Dept. clear vendor number in F-44 = 10000587

Step5 : PU Dept. can not record this document again, show window posted. Not show cancel.

I don't know, What do I have to do?

 

Thank you.

APINYA O

entry.title: Why WSDL File is Needed in SOAP Adapter (SAP CPI)?
entry.content:
In SAP Cloud Integration (CPI), a WSDL (Web Services Description Language) file is essential when configuring the SOAP adapter because it acts as a contract between the client (CPI) and the web service. The WSDL clearly defines what operations the web service offers, what input/output structures are expected, and which data types are involved. This ensures that CPI can communicate correctly with the external SOAP service.

When a WSDL file is uploaded, CPI can automatically configure key details such as the endpoint URL, SOAP actions, and message structures. It also enables the generation of message schemas (XSDs), which are necessary for message validation and graphical message mapping. This automation reduces manual effort and helps avoid configuration errors.

If the WSDL is not provided, the developer must manually enter all configuration details and ensure the message formats match exactly with the service requirements. This increases the risk of runtime issues such as incorrect SOAP structure, invalid data formats, or client errors. Without the WSDL, CPI also lacks the necessary schema definitions, making mapping and validation more complex and error-prone.

entry.title: Re: S4H SD Billing Rounding Issue
entry.content: Check SAP note 80183

entry.title: Re: Downtime optimization using DoDMO during ECC to S/4 Conversion Run
entry.content: 3572868 - Executing and Monitoring Downtime-Optimized Conversion to SAP S/4HANA with SUM 2.0 SP 23

entry.title: A Uniting Business Network in a Shifting Context
entry.content:
On June 11, some 55 trading partners representing 30 organizations gathered in the SAP office of Berlin for the European edition of the Network Success Day. These smaller, more focused events are organized regularly by the SAP account management teams and take place in multiple locations across the globe. The Berlin edition offered a relevant agenda, strong engagement from the audience and insightful conversations during the many networking opportunities. The present organizations were equally balanced between buyers and suppliers on SAP Business Network, representing 4.1M documents and $40.4B exchanged annually. Here is what I saw and heard.

Click to get a quick glance at the Berlin Network Success Day

 

A well-balanced event
Albeit small, the event welcomed a wide variety of roles from both buying and selling organizations, each coming in with their own expectations. This challenge was met with a diverse agenda of 8 sessions including 2 breakouts, and by the end of the day it seemed that everyone got what they came for. In addition to innovations and testimonials, the topics covered strategy talks, best practices, AI, sustainability and e-invoicing mandate – including the famed X-Rechnung for Germany. To me, the most interesting remained the questions and the conversations that took place during breaks and dedicated networking moments. The feeling was shared by Manutan, saying on stage that they love the network part of SAP Business Network, and not only during events.

 

Not a perfect world
What struck me during the event is the honesty and candor in the room. Everyone was there to express both their joys and frustrations in a constructive, well-informed way. The presence of Beata Kortus, representing the Product Development side of the business, was much appreciated for the more technical side of the strategic talks. The challenges, mainly around data matching, supplier enablement and invoicing compliance, were enunciated clearly and duly noted - if not already tackled by the SAP Business Network team.

 

SAP’s key differentiator? They listen!
The general excitement around the innovations was not baseless. Several suppliers, some of them on stage, expressed their gratitude in having more decision power in their collaboration with customers and with SAP, and confirmed that we were addressing the right challenges in the right way. They went on explaining that any trouble on SAP Business Network means a potential limitation of business with current and future customers. Hence the need to vocalize their concern.

“SAP listens and acts, and that’s a key differentiator from their competitors” was a sentence I heard several times throughout the day. At lunch, an insightful conversation on the shifting requirements for electronic catalogs and the pros and cons of level 1 vs. level 2 Punchout concluded in the following: “SAP is bridging the gap between the buying and supplying organizations by organizing such events, helping to develop best practices and an awareness of the other side’s perspective, especially on supplier enablement.”

 

Silver linings in a shifting context
Hosting this event in Berlin was probably a fitting place to invite reflections on the current disrupted times. The ideas and conclusions that came out offered some way into minimizing risks. In an unstable geopolitical context, trading partners are looking for stability and transparency in their business relationships. And that’s precisely what we at SAP can do for them. It also appears that the upcoming regulatory e-invoicing mandates in Europe and beyond means that buying organizations are more open to change, willing to explore and test out solutions. No doubt that many suppliers will show them the way to SAP Business Network as a trusted solution.

 

 

Want to keep receiving news for suppliers on SAP Business Network? Subscribe to the SAP Business Network for Suppliers tag, or visit our dedicated page SAP Business Network for Suppliers | SAP Community

entry.title: Second SAP Stammtisch in Hout Bay – Glühwein, Good People, and Great Conversations
entry.content:
Despite the weather, seven SAP professionals made it out, creating a relaxed and welcoming round of discussions. With a glass of Glühwein (yes, glass — not mug!) in hand, the group quickly found common ground. The crowd was a vibrant mix: company owners, freelancers, and project managers, each bringing their own perspective on SAP and the local tech scene.

While we touched on everyday topics — from the recent Cape Town fires to life in the local consulting market — a few SAP themes dominated the evening:

  • Cloud vs. On-Premise: A discussion on what truly delivers value to customers today. We looked at flexibility, cost-efficiency, and long-term ownership — especially in the South African context.

  • SAP Fioneer: Some were curious about SAP’s financial services spin-off. We talked about its strategy, why it was spun off, and what it might mean for SAP’s industry cloud direction.

  • SAP’s retrenchment program: A topic that’s impossible to ignore. We talked about how it affects talent, partner ecosystems, and project dynamics — not just globally, but also here on the ground.

To make planning easier for the next round, we agreed to set up a dedicated WhatsApp group. It’ll serve as a home base for SAP professionals in the Cape Town area who want to stay connected, share knowledge, and meet up informally.

The atmosphere? Casual. The drinks? Comforting. The conversations? Absolutely worthwhile.

If you’re in or around Cape Town and work with SAP — keep an eye out. The Stammtisch is growing, and we’d love to have you at the next one. Read more on the Redcup Code website around the Cape Town SAP Stammtisch.

entry.title: Re: Requirement for User Exit/BAdI to Prevent Diesel Rese...
entry.content: You can try with BADI WORKORDER_UPDATE or EXIT_SAPLMLSP_031

entry.title: Cannot Generate Handling Unit Using 311 to move storage IM to WM Managed
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Regarding our need to move stock from Sloc IM Managed to WM Managed using 311, we need to automatically generate the Handling Unit. But now, we cannot pack it automatically even if we maintain the packing instructions & determination. Is there any additional configuration needed to maintain automatic packing using movement type 311?

Regards,

Melani

entry.title: Re: Story Reporting - KPI: Number of Interviews per Quarter
entry.content:
Hello

Have you tried ensuring that each interview is counted only once, regardless of the number of interviewers?

Have you tried using a Distinct Count on the Interview Identifier?

Step-by-Step in Story Reporting:

1. Open your Story in Story Reporting

   - Use the Story built on the Recruiting V2 schema or relevant schema.

2. Select the Table or Chart where interviews are reported

3. Add the Unique Interview Identifier

   - Use a field like “Interview ID” or “Interview Session ID”.

   - This identifier is constant across rows even if there are multiple interviewers.

4. Apply “Distinct Count” Aggregation

   - Instead of a normal count, choose:

     • "Count Distinct" or

     • "Measure Aggregation → Distinct Count"

   - Apply this to the Interview ID field.

5. Group by Quarter

   - Add Interview Date and group it by quarter using a time hierarchy or a calculated field.

6. Optional Filters

   - Filter by interview status (e.g., Completed) if needed.

Example Output:

| Quarter | Distinct Interview Count |

|----------|---------------------------|

| Q1 2025 | 84 |

| Q2 2025 | 96 |

Explanation:

-------------

In the data model, each row might represent one link between an interview and an interviewer. So, one interview with 3 interviewers = 3 rows. A standard COUNT on Interview ID returns 3 instead of 1.

If you're unsure which field is the true unique identifier, preview the data or ask your SAP administrator which technical key to use (e.g., interviewId, interviewSessionId).

 

regards

entry.title: Re: Program for KSB1 to run multiple variants together
entry.content:
Dear Pankaj  ,

What Raymond suggested is correct , i am just giving you example , pass parameter for Selection -set for every time calling submit report ,but do remember to clear data after every call and before that save data in internal table and use GUi_download with path open and closed , below is code of  KSB1 report with all data in that structure ,you can modify  work area and use it 

  DATA:
    wa_ksb1_output TYPE kaep_covp_ext," 
    it_ksb1_output LIKE STANDARD TABLE OF wa_ksb1_output.


RANGES : p_aufnr FOR  aufk-aufnr.
RANGES : p_obdat FOR aufk-stdat.

  DATA lr_result TYPE REF TO data.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS:
    <resulttab> TYPE STANDARD TABLE,
    <resultstr> TYPE any.


cl_salv_bs_runtime_info=>set( EXPORTING display = abap_false metadata = abap_false data = abap_true ).


SUBMIT rkaep000  USING SELECTION-SET 'ZBI'
                   EXPORTING LIST TO MEMORY
                  AND RETURN .


 TRY.

      cl_salv_bs_runtime_info=>get_data_ref( IMPORTING r_data = lr_result ).

    CATCH cx_salv_bs_sc_runtime_info ##NO_HANDLER.

  ENDTRY.

  cl_salv_bs_runtime_info=>clear_all( ).

  UNASSIGN <resulttab>.
  ASSIGN lr_result->* TO <resulttab>.

  IF <resulttab> IS ASSIGNED.
    LOOP AT <resulttab> ASSIGNING <resultstr>.
      CLEAR wa_ksb1_output.
      MOVE-CORRESPONDING <resultstr> TO wa_ksb1_output.
      APPEND wa_ksb1_output TO it_ksb1_output.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Cannot Generate Handling Unit Using 311 to move stora...
entry.content:
Dear Melani

 

Have you tried the key additional configurations and checks below?

1. Packing Determination Configuration

  • Ensure that packing determination procedures are correctly assigned to:
    • The delivery type (in this case, for the delivery created during 311 transfer, usually NL or NLCC).
    • The item category used in the delivery document.
  • In S/4HANA Cloud, verify these via SSCUI or configuration steps for Packing Determination Strategy.

2. Maintain Automatic Packing in Delivery Type

  • The delivery type used for 311 (e.g. NL) must have the flag "Automatic Packing Allowed" activated.
  • This is usually set in the delivery type configuration (in On-Prem, it’s in ovlk, but in Public Cloud you do this through SSCUIs or pre-delivered config).

3. Ensure Delivery is Created and PGI-Ready

  • When 311 is executed between IM and WM-managed slocs, SAP usually triggers an inbound delivery in the background.
  • Packing logic is applied at delivery level, so auto-packing must be executed when the delivery is created — either via output management or a BAdI.

4. Use of BAdI for Packing Automation

In S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, to trigger automatic packing upon delivery creation, you often need to implement the BAdI: BADI_HU_AUTOPACK or BADI_HU_PACKING_CONTROL.

  • These are available in In-App Extensibility.
  • You can use them to call the hu_create function and apply packing instructions programmatically.

5. Material Master Data

  • Ensure that the material master contains:
    • Proper packaging data (in the Sales: General/Plant view).
    • The packaging material is defined as HU-relevant.
    • A unit of measure group that supports packing.

6. Handling Unit Management Activation

  • Ensure HU Management is active at the WM-managed storage location.
  • If HU management is only active at the delivery level (and not in WM), packing might not trigger correctly.

Summary of Required Actions:

If all the above are correctly configured, automatic packing should trigger upon delivery creation from the 311 movement. If it still fails, a custom logic via BAdI could be the last resort in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, as many classic user exits are not available.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Open a page from an app in SAP Build work zone standa...
entry.content:
Hello, 

for me it looks like you might have mixed up some IDs here. Please see the following URL and the explanations for the parameters afterwards. Consider especially the difference between site ID and page ID.

https://wasl-sap-mobile-start.launchpad.cfapps.eu20.hana.ondemand.com/site/<insert your site alias here>#Launchpad-openFLPPage?pageId=<insert your page ID>&spaceID=<insert your space ID> 

Site Alias: This is the alias that you can configure for your Build Work Zone Std. Ed. Site (three dot menu in the Site Directory for your site -> Manage Site Alias. It seems that you configured this to be "Portal" is that correct? If yes than this part of the URL is correct and the launchpad should open with the link at the end of this message. If you have not configured a site alias, then the site ID needs to be specified with the parameter siteID (see in Site Manager in the details of the site). Then the link should look something like this:

https://wasl-sap-mobile-start.launchpad.cfapps.eu20.hana.ondemand.com/site?siteID=<insert your site ID here>#Launchpad-openFLPPage?pageId=<insert your page ID>&spaceID=<insert your space ID> 

Page ID: This is the ID of the BWZ Page (not site) in the sense of spaces and pages, the "new" layout options of the SAP Fiori launchpad and SAP Build Work Zone Standard Edition launchpad. This you can see in the BWZ Content Manager when opening the details of a page.

Space ID: This is the ID of the BWZ Space) in the sense of spaces and pages, the "new" layout options of the SAP Fiori launchpad and SAP Build Work Zone Standard Edition launchpad. This you can see in the BWZ Content Manager when opening the details of a space. Specify the space which contains the above mentioned page.

Note: Both, page ID and space ID need to be specified.

 

To just link the "Portal" BWZ launchpad you can omit the page ID and the space ID and the first space/page of the launchpad will be displayed. The link should then look something like this:

with site alias: https://wasl-sap-mobile-start.launchpad.cfapps.eu20.hana.ondemand.com/site/Portal 

or with site ID: https://wasl-sap-mobile-start.launchpad.cfapps.eu20.hana.ondemand.com/site?siteID=<insert your site ID here> 

 

Let me know if it works.

Best regards
Simon

entry.title: Re: My First RAP Project. Many errors in Child and Parent projection view.
entry.content: @Gargi6Can you share the definitions of the base entities (parent and child) as well as the projection entities?

entry.title: Re: Deploying App into SAP Build Work Zone / Fiori Launchpad in BTP
entry.content: Thank you for sharing this information. I would like to understand the most feasible approach to connect a single SAPUI5 application to multiple backend systems. Would it be necessary to create two separate sites, each connecting to a different backend, or is there an alternative method you would recommend?

entry.title: Re: Program for KSB1 to run multiple variants together
entry.content: Look at class cl_salv_ex_util, cl_salv_bs_tt_util to convert returned data to xlsx, html, pdf, etc.

entry.title: Re: Choosing the Right Analytical Tool: A Comprehensive Guide for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
@Katharina_Klug : Very nice articulated. In recent discussions with clients, we have often seen clients being confused whether they'll suffice with embedded analytics or would they require enterprise wide analytical layer. Though it seems straight forward for the decision, but in real life it often is not - and this blogpost is a good starting point to get on with the decision matrix. Looking forward for more.

Thanks,
Saumi
